steps.title: Find the hourly fee
steps.content:
The first $2$ hours cost $180$. A $7$-hour repair costs $455$, so the additional $5$ hours cost
$$
455-180=275
$$
The hourly fee after the first two hours is
$$
\frac{275}{5}=55
$$

steps.title: Build the cost function
steps.content: For $x\geq 2$, the cost is $180$ plus $55$ for each hour beyond the first $2$ hours: $$ f(x)=180+55(x-2)=55x+70 $$ The answer is A.
